title: Simulated-to-real benchmarking of acquisition methods in untargeted metabolomics.
author: Wandy J McBride R Rogers S Terzis N Weidt S van der Hooft JJJ Bryson K Daly R Davies V
content: S-EPMC10027714 PMC10027714 Simulated-to-real benchmarking of acquisition methods in untargeted metabolomics. Data-Dependent and Data-Independent Acquisition modes (DDA and DIA, respectively) are both widely used to acquire MS2 spectra in untargeted liquid chromatography tandem mass spectrometry
